ask.reason: command-policy: git --force-with-lease rewrites remote history — approve?
command-policy: git --mirror push overwrites all remote refs — approve?
command-policy: git reset --hard discards working-tree changes — approve?
command-policy: git clean -f deletes untracked files — approve?
command-policy: git branch -D force-deletes a branch — approve?
command-policy: git push --delete removes a remote ref — approve?
command-policy: git push <remote> :ref deletes a remote branch — approve?
command-policy: git filter-branch rewrites history — approve?
command-policy: git reflog delete removes recovery history — approve?
command-policy: git reflog expire removes recovery history — approve?
command-policy: git update-ref -d deletes a ref — approve?
